role.zh: 负责整个网页的设计和制作
role.en: Owned the visual execution, navigation split, project detail structure, and live status surface.

problem.en: Turn the personal site from a static intro page into a place that can carry skills, projects, and a live activity entry point.

summary.en: A minimal personal website that currently ships four base pages: about, skills, projects, and contact, while keeping enough room for future additions.

en: Expanded a single-screen homepage into a multi-page structure so new content can be added incrementally.
Kept the top navigation fixed to reduce navigation friction across core pages.
Reserved screenshot and code sections in the detail page to accumulate future portfolio case studies.

caption.zh: 用于展示名字、身份和当前状态的首页首屏。
caption.en: The hero section that introduces the name, role, and current working state.

caption.zh: 统一的项目卡片列表，负责承接项目浏览入口。
caption.en: A unified project card grid that acts as the browsing entry point.

caption.zh: 详情页保留截图区、代码区和外链入口。
caption.en: The detail page keeps dedicated areas for screenshots, code, and external links.
